$comment: Eval-coverage ratchet waivers (eval_check.py). A waiver defers, never forgets: it needs a reason and an expiry, expiry failures are CI-red, and a waiver goes stale (also red) the moment its skill gains a scenario. The expiry dates are not a single cliff: every waiver lands on one of the dated tiers in burndown_schedule below, each keyed to a concrete unblocking fixture/harness, and eval_check caps the waivers per tier (max_waivers) so coverage burns down on a schedule instead of renewing all at once. Adding a waiver means picking the earliest tier its unblocker allows. Burn-down target: dialog- and fixture-unblocked skills live by 2026-Q4, the ship genre by 2026-11-30, and the runtime-harness-heavy probes by 2027-Q1.

burndown_schedule.unblocker: WS6-T9 scripted-dialog eval harness + WS6-T11 drift-gate fixture repo
WS6-T8 golden written-plan/spec fixtures + the ce-go intent-fixture harness
two-branch Git and verified-plan fixtures for the ship genre

waivers.reason: interactive persona interview; unblocked by WS6-T9's scripted-dialog eval harness
verdict-rendering on human-supplied options; needs the option-set fixture WS6-T9's dialog harness seeds
idea-genre; judgment-heavy, low regression risk; unblocked by WS6-T9's dialog/fixture harness
idea-genre; judgment-heavy, low regression risk; unblocked by WS6-T9's dialog/fixture harness
deterministic scanner already unit-tested (test_repo_profile); interactive half unblocked by WS6-T9's dialog harness
interactive teaching loop; unblocked by WS6-T9's scripted-dialog eval harness

auto-detected two-mode diagnosis (absorbs the retired plan-free investigator's flow): needs a seeded failing-feature fixture with a plan (planned mode) and a misbehaving-component fixture — a stuck consumer/worker (plan-free mode); both satisfied by WS6-T11's drift-gate + fixture harness
whole-suite regression walk needs an implemented-plan fixture; satisfied by WS6-T11's drift-gate fixture repo
plan-lint's structural gate (H1-H8) is unit-tested in tests/test_plan_lint.py; the model-judged audit lenses need the golden written-plan fixture WS6-T8 creates
aggregation is unit-tested (test_metrics_report, test_audit_export); model narration needs the golden plan-with-metrics fixture from WS6-T8/T11

mechanical model->backlog.json map + a stdlib emitter unit-tested in test_backlog_emit (all four formats + the parent-linking rule); live scenario needs WS6-T8's golden spec fixture (model-policy down-routable)
router over already-evaluated skills; needs the intent-fixture eval that seeds repo states (plan present/absent, spec dir, running target) and asserts the routed /ce-* target
interactive domain-teaching loop (sibling of ce-onboard); unblocked by WS6-T9's scripted-dialog eval harness — staggered to this tier because the 2026-09-30 tier is at its max_waivers cap
run-the-examples contract needs a buildable-app fixture (WS6-T13 examples manifest)
go/no-go over verification artifacts needs a verified-plan fixture (WS6-T11)
requires live web research (non-deterministic); needs the recorded-web harness workstream
needs a runnable target-app fixture with load consent; needs the runtime-harness workstream
needs a sandboxed vulnerable-target fixture; consent-gated; needs the runtime-harness workstream

auto-detected two-mode UX audit (absorbs the retired plan-free adversarial UX probe): needs a running app + browser harness — journey-walk mode also needs a traced plan; adversarial-discovery mode runs plan-free on any repo; needs the runtime-harness workstream

auto-detected two-mode doc audit; executable-doc mode needs a sandboxed runnable-doc fixture + a command-execution harness (like ux-audit's runtime workstream); conceptual mode is comprehension-only; needs the runtime-harness workstream
